lines.raw: Lesson 127 | 第127课
A famous actress | 著名的女演员

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: Who is only twenty-nine, and why is it so unclear?
lines.chinese: 谁才29岁？为什么这点不清楚？
lines.raw: Who is only twenty-nine, and why is it so unclear? | 谁才29岁？为什么这点不清楚？

lines.english: Can you recognize that woman, Liz?
lines.chinese: 莉兹，你认得出那个女人吗？
lines.raw: Can you recognize that woman, Liz? | 莉兹，你认得出那个女人吗？
I think I can, Kate. | 我想我认得，凯特。

lines.english: It must be Karen Marsh, the actress.
lines.chinese: 她肯定是女演员卡伦·马什。
lines.raw: It must be Karen Marsh, the actress. | 她肯定是女演员卡伦·马什。
I thought so. | 我也这么想。
Who's that beside her? | 她旁边的那个人是谁？

lines.chinese: 那肯定是康拉德·里夫斯。
lines.raw: That must be Conrad Reeves. | 那肯定是康拉德·里夫斯。
Conrad Reeves, the actor? | 演员康拉德·里夫斯？
It can't be. | 不可能。
Let me have another look. | 我再看看。

lines.chinese: 卡伦·马什看起来真老啊！
lines.raw: Doesn't Karen Marsh look old! | 卡伦·马什看起来真老啊！
She does, doesn't she! | 是啊，她看起来确实老！

lines.english: I read she's twenty-nine, but she must be at least forty.
lines.chinese: 我读到她29岁，但她至少有40岁了。
lines.raw: I read she's twenty-nine, but she must be at least forty. | 我读到她29岁，但她至少有40岁了。
I'm sure she is. | 我敢肯定她是。

lines.english: She was a famous actress when I was still at school.
lines.chinese: 我还在上学的时候，她就是一位著名的女演员了。
lines.raw: She was a famous actress when I was still at school. | 我还在上学的时候，她就是一位著名的女演员了。

lines.english: That was a long time ago, wasn't it?
lines.chinese: 那是很久以前的事了，不是吗？
lines.raw: That was a long time ago, wasn't it? | 那是很久以前的事了，不是吗？
Not that long ago! | 没那么久！

lines.english: I'm not more than twenty-nine myself.
lines.raw: I'm not more than twenty-nine myself. | 我自己也不超过29岁。
I think you're right! | 我想你是对的！

lines.chinese: 他不是她的第三任丈夫吗？
lines.raw: Isn't he her third husband? | 他不是她的第三任丈夫吗？
No. | 不。

lines.english: He must be her fourth or fifth.
lines.chinese: 他肯定是她的第四任或第五任丈夫。
lines.raw: He must be her fourth or fifth. | 他肯定是她的第四任或第五任丈夫。
